description: MCP server for LinkedIn Ads — 19 read-only tools for campaigns, performance, and Lead Gen Forms.

name: io.github.ZLeventer/linkedin-campaign-manager-mcp

environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn Developer App OAuth client ID
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn Developer App OAuth client secret
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the OAuth token.json file (created by 'npm run auth')
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Default LinkedIn ad account ID (numeric, no urn: prefix). Tools fall back to this when ad_account_id is not passed.
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_DEFAULT_AD_ACCOUNT

environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn Rosetta API version in YYYYMM format (default 202504)
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_API_VERSION

title: LinkedIn Campaign Manager
